name: beta_ge_two_of_condition
header:
import HilbertTest.NoncriticalBelyi.Elementary

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem beta_ge_two_of_condition
    {beta C : Real}
    (hC : 2 <= C)
    (h1 : beta / 1 >= C) :
    2 <= beta := by
informal_prefix: /-- Mochizuki Noncritical Belyi Maps, Lemma 2.1 arithmetic: if C >= 2 and beta/1 >= C, then beta >= 2. Use the checked elementary theorem. -/

name: beta_gt_alpha_of_scale
header:
import HilbertTest.NoncriticalBelyi.Elementary

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem beta_gt_alpha_of_scale
    {alpha beta C : Real}
    (hC : 2 <= C)
    (halpha_pos : 0 < alpha)
    (hscale : beta / alpha >= C) :
    alpha < beta := by
informal_prefix: /-- Mochizuki Lemma 2.1 arithmetic: a scale ratio at least C >= 2 forces beta > alpha for positive alpha. Use the checked elementary theorem. -/

name: ratio_sub_one_ge_ratio
header:
import HilbertTest.NoncriticalBelyi.Elementary

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem ratio_sub_one_ge_ratio
    {alpha beta : Real}
    (halpha : 1 < alpha)
    (hbeta : alpha <= beta) :
    beta / alpha <= (beta - 1) / (alpha - 1) := by
informal_prefix: /-- Mochizuki Lemma 2.1 arithmetic: shifting numerator and denominator by one increases the ratio under 1 < alpha <= beta. Use the checked elementary theorem. -/

name: belyi_aux_ratio_lower_bound
header:
import HilbertTest.NoncriticalBelyi.Elementary

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem belyi_aux_ratio_lower_bound
    {m n : Nat} {alpha beta : Real}
    (hm : 1 <= m)
    (hn : 1 <= n)
    (halpha : 1 < alpha)
    (hbeta : alpha <= beta) :
    (beta / alpha) <=
      (beta / alpha) ^ m * ((beta - 1) / (alpha - 1)) ^ n := by
informal_prefix: /-- Mochizuki Lemma 2.1 arithmetic: lower-bound the auxiliary Belyi ratio by beta/alpha. Use the checked elementary theorem. -/

name: belyi_aux_ratio_ge_quadratic
header:
import HilbertTest.NoncriticalBelyi.Elementary

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem belyi_aux_ratio_ge_quadratic
    {m n : Nat} {alpha beta : Real}
    (hm : 1 <= m)
    (hn : 1 <= n)
    (halpha : 1 < alpha)
    (hbeta : alpha <= beta) :
    (beta / alpha) ^ 2 <=
      (beta / alpha) ^ m * ((beta - 1) / (alpha - 1)) ^ n := by
informal_prefix: /-- Mochizuki Lemma 2.1 arithmetic: lower-bound the auxiliary Belyi ratio by the square of beta/alpha. Use the checked elementary theorem. -/

name: belyi_aux_beta_gt_one
header:
import HilbertTest.NoncriticalBelyi.Elementary

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem belyi_aux_beta_gt_one
    {m n : Nat} {beta : Real}
    (hm : 1 <= m)
    (hn : 1 <= n)
    (hbeta : 2 <= beta) :
    1 < NoncriticalBelyi.belyiAux m n beta := by
informal_prefix: /-- Mochizuki Lemma 2.1 arithmetic: the auxiliary polynomial is greater than one at beta >= 2. Use the checked elementary theorem. -/

name: abs_belyi_aux_le_one_on_unit_interval
header:
import HilbertTest.NoncriticalBelyi.Elementary

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem abs_belyi_aux_le_one_on_unit_interval
    {m n : Nat} {x : Real}
    (hm : 1 <= m)
    (hn : 1 <= n)
    (hx0 : 0 <= x)
    (hx1 : x <= 1) :
    |NoncriticalBelyi.belyiAux m n x| <= 1 := by
informal_prefix: /-- Mochizuki Lemma 2.1 arithmetic: on the unit interval, the absolute value of x^m*(x-1)^n is bounded by one. Use the checked elementary theorem. -/
